attributes.action: Increase The Lifetime ISA House Price Cap to Reflect Inflation
attributes.additional_details: This change would allow more FTBs to benefit from the scheme, reducing a barrier to entry in the housing market and encouraging home ownership.
attributes.background: The LISA house price cap of £450,000 set in 2017 does not reflect the current financial landscape, with inflation adjusting this sum to around £625,000. I believe the cap should be adjusted to this figure, and re-adjusted annually or bi-annually, in line with trends of inflation.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757202
